stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
In which latitude band are westerly waves most likely to occur over the North Atlantic and which way are they travelling?

options.a: 20°N to 30°N and they are travelling East.
options.b: 30°N to 40°N and they are travelling West.
options.c: 40°N to 50°N and they are travelling East.
options.d: 50°N to 60°N and they are travelling West.
